title: lampranthus thermarum
intro: Lampranthus thermarum, also known as the 'Flower of the Free State', is a succulent plant native to South Africa, specifically in the Free State region. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Lampranthus thermarum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
